creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
With GNATS committers used to get mails like the following, which are gone
now after the move to Bugzilla.

I'd love to get those, or something comparable that is push versus pull
restored.

==== snip ====
From: FreeBSD bugmaster <bugmaster@freebsd.org>
To: gerald@FreeBSD.org
Date: Mon, 19 May 2014 11:07:01 GMT
Subject: Current problem reports assigned to gerald@FreeBSD.org 

Note: to view an individual PR, use:
  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=(number).

The following is a listing of current problems submitted by FreeBSD users.
These represent problem reports covering all versions including
experimental development code and obsolete releases.


S Tracker      Resp.      Description
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
----
o ports/189444 gerald     [patch] USE_GCC=yes clashes with DEFAULT_VERSIONS
o ports/188565 gerald     [PATCH] devel/py-traits: stage
o ports/188424 gerald     emulators/wine build with gcc47 fails
f ports/186852 gerald     [patch] Add 'fstack-protector-strong' to
lang/gcc48
f ports/182657 gerald     [patch] lang/gcc48: expose c99 math in 'std'
namespace

5 problems total.
==== snap ====
